creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #13)
Great patch. Thanks. Was busy on this also. Will test your patch this soon.

Are all the changes in the patch like _MACHINE_CPUFUNC_H_ and __bool_true_false_are_defined also acceptable on non-armv7 architectures (amd64, aarch64, etc.) or do we need to make them conditional?
